revisedPrompt:
Generate exactly one PNG image for a game-development pixel-art asset.

Canvas / sheet contract:
- Exact image size: 128x96 pixels.
- Grid: 1 row x 1 column, one frame only.
- Background: solid #FF00FF chroma-key magenta filling every empty pixel; no gradients, no transparency.
- No grid lines, no frame border, no labels, no text, no watermark.
- Leave clear solid #FF00FF margin between the object and every canvas edge.

Style:
- Crisp high-resolution 16-bit SFC/SNES-style pixel art, low-resolution pixel clusters, no antialiasing blur.
- Consistent cheerful satoyama palette: muted matcha and moss greens, warm timber browns, white plaster, vermilion-and-white accents.
- One-pixel dark outline where useful.
- Top-left light source.
- Bright, clean, readable village-map prop.

Subject:
- ONE Japanese thatched farmhouse, kayabuki minka, as a single coherent authored field-prop object.
- Strict flat front elevation view, perfectly straight-on from the front like a facade, fully face-on and symmetrical.
- No perspective, no three-quarter angle, no side walls, no roof sides visible.
- The object should fill most of the 128x96 canvas while keeping margin.
- Thick mossy thatched roof with a gentle ridge seen straight-on, roof overhangs and uneven eaves breaking the rectangular silhouette.
- Dark timber frame with white plaster walls.
- Centered wooden sliding door tall enough for a person to walk through.
- A small round window.
- Vegetable crates and a straw broom beside the entrance.
- Subtle dirt, shadow, varied roof and wall texture, trim, readable details, and a soft contact shadow along the base.
- Clean collision footprint; one coherent building, not repeated wall/roof tile stamps.

Hard cleanliness constraints:
- No detached fragments, no isolated dust specks, no random pixel islands, no seam slivers, no leftover effect residue.
- No cell separator lines or frame numbers.
- No modern objects.
- No characters, creatures, birds, companion animals, armor, helmets, ninja outfit, weapons, guns, logos, letter emblems, UI, or text.
- Avoid any likeness of Mario, Nintendo, Zelda, Final Fantasy, Pokemon, Dragon Quest, Secret of Mana, Okami, Sakuna, or other protected franchise characters/logos.

Output only the image.
